title: androrchis × buelii
intro: Androrchis × buelii, also known as the hybrid lady's slipper orchid, is a rare and exotic plant that is a cross between Spiranthes romanzoffiana and Calypso bulbosa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Androrchis × buelii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, but its use is not well-studied and more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
